---
title: "Essential Digital Skills"
---

## Course Overview

Essential Digital Skills is a foundation course for digital research practice at the University of Nottingham. It focuses on practical workflows for collaboration, governance, data management, and responsible digital practice.

## Who This Is For

- Early-career researchers developing digital research capability.
- Research staff needing stronger data and governance workflows.
- Professional services colleagues supporting research delivery.

## What You Need

- Access to institutional digital platforms (for example M365/Teams/SharePoint).
- A device for practical exercises and group tasks.
- Optional: a current project example to apply workshop activities directly.

## Lesson Sequence

| Lesson | Focus |
|---|---|
| [01 Digital Tools](episodes/01-digital_tools.qmd) | Core tools and institutional systems |
| [02 Digital Delivery](episodes/02-digital_delivery.qmd) | Workflow and delivery practices |
| [03 Data Governance and Policy](episodes/03-data_governance_and_policy.qmd) | Governance, compliance, and policy context |
| [04 Research Data Management](episodes/04-research_data_managment.qmd) | RDM planning and lifecycle |
| [05 Collecting the Right Data](episodes/05-collecting_the_right_data.qmd) | Data quality and collection design |
| [06 Organising and Exploring Data](episodes/06-organising_and_exploring_data.qmd) | Structuring and initial exploration |
| [07 Making Sense of Data](episodes/07-making_sense_of_data.qmd) | Interpretation and insight building |
| [08 Insight to Impacts](episodes/08-insight_to_impacts.qmd) | Communicating impact |
| [EXT1 Responsible AI](episodes/ext1-responsible_ai.qmd) | Risks and responsible AI use |
| [EXT2 Hands-on AI](episodes/ext2-hands_on_ai.qmd) | Applied AI activity |

## Course Materials

### Learners

- [Setup](learners/setup.qmd)
- [Reference](learners/reference.qmd)
- [Discussion](learners/discuss.qmd)

### Instructors

- [Instructor Notes](instructors/instructor-notes.qmd)
- [Additional Material](instructors/additional_material.qmd)
- [Extra Exercises](instructors/extra_exercises.qmd)

### Community and Profiles

- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.qmd)
- [Learner Profiles](profiles/learner-profiles.qmd)
